title: Synaedrys litseifolia
taxonomy: Synaedrys litseifolia is a plant species that is now considered as an outdated name. The species is now known to belong to the family Ericaceae. It is a type of flowering plant, and its classification is closely related to the genus Pieris and the genus Linnaea. Synaedrys litseifolia is often considered a synonym for the species Pieris japonica. As a result, the species name is no longer commonly used.
